headline: Newmont CTO Transition Puts Technical Priorities And Valuation In Focus
summary: Newmont (NYSE:NEM) announced the retirement of Executive Vice President and Chief Technical Officer Francois Hardy after 24 years with the company. The company appointed Erin Workman as interim Chief Technical Officer as part of its leadership succession planning. This executive transition focuses on continuity in technical oversight and project execution across Newmont's global mining portfolio. For you as an investor, this is a key leadership change at one of the largest gold producers,...

headline: Lahontan Gold – Historic Mine Poised for a Comeback
summary: Nevada Takes Center StageThe Iran conflict once again demonstrates why gold remains in demand as a safe-haven asset during times of geopolitical uncertainty. While rising oil prices fuel inflation fears and put pressure on capital markets, capital is increasingly flowing into defensive tangible assets.
